name: context-probe-inputs
description: Interactive support for scaffold-first context-probe YAML inputs, curated promotion, and assessment updates.

interface.shortDescription: Scaffold, curate, and review context-probe YAML inputs.
interface.longDescription: Supports scaffold-first repo application for context-probe. It helps save drafts, promote curated YAML, prepare observation templates, recommend dedicated worktrees, and refresh assessment notes without inventing evidence.
defaultPrompt: Promote scaffold YAML into curated inputs.
Prepare observation templates and refresh assessment.
